2605.16863.title: Plan First, Diffuse Later: Extrinsic Graph Guidance for Long-Horizon Diffusion Planning
2605.16863.paper_summary: Compositional diffusion models offer a promising route to long-horizon planning by denoising multiple overlapping sub-trajectories while ensuring that together they constitute a global solution. However, enforcing local behavior over long chains is often insufficient for a coherent global structure to emerge. Recent works tackle this limitation through intrinsic search, which explores multiple paths during the denoising process. While intrinsic search improves global coherence, it comes at the cost of repeated evaluations of an already compute-heavy model. In this work, we argue that extrinsic search, performed outside the denoising process, offers a more effective mode of exploration for long-horizon planning while naturally enabling the use of classical algorithms to solve unseen combinatorial tasks at test time. Our eXtrinsic search-guided Diffuser (XDiffuser) first computes a plan over a state-space graph -- serving as a lightweight local connectivity oracle for the diffusion model. The plan is then used to guide denoising for a single trajectory, effectively offloading the burden of exploration. XDiffuser outperforms diffusion-based baselines on long-horizon tasks, with particularly large gains in the low-quality data regime and on unseen tasks beyond goal-reaching, including multi-agent coordination and TSP-style reasoning. Project website: https://yanivhass.github.io/XDiffuser-site/
2605.16863.paper_summary_zh: 組合擴散模型為長期規劃提供了一條有前景的途徑，通過去噪多個重疊的子軌跡，同時確保它們共同構成一個全局解決方案。<lb/>然而，在長鏈上強制執行局部行為通常不足以使一致的全局結構出現。<lb/>最近的研究通過內在搜索來解決這一限制，內在搜索在去噪過程中探索多條路徑。<lb/>雖然內在搜索提高了全局一致性，但這也帶來了對已經計算繁重的模型進行重複評估的代價。<lb/>在本研究中，我們主張，外在搜索在去噪過程之外進行，為長期規劃提供了一種更有效的探索模式，同時自然地使經典算法能夠在測試時解決未見的組合任務。<lb/>我們的外在搜索引導擴散器（XDiffuser）首先在狀態空間圖上計算計劃——作為擴散模型的輕量級局部連通性Oracle。<lb/>然後使用該計劃來指導單一軌跡的去噪，有效地減輕了探索的負擔。<lb/>XDiffuser在長期任務上超越了基於擴散的基準，特別是在低質量數據範圍內和在超出目標達成的未見任務上，包括多代理協調和TSP風格推理。<lb/>項目網站：https://yanivhass.github.io/XDiffuser-site/
2605.16863.author: Yaniv Hassidof et.al.
2605.16863.authors: Yaniv Hassidof, Adir Morgan, Yilun Du, Kiril Solovey
